description: Crafted from 85% cotton and 15% polyester fabric, this brassiere from enamor is designed with double layered cups for daily wear. The décolleté elastic and straps adds to the modern look while a shape that offers exemplary comfort makes it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support throughout the day.Made of breathable 85% cotton and 15% polyester fabric for enhanced comfortDouble layered cupsDetachable shoulder straps that can be worn criss-cross styleMedium coverageMade of moulded stretch cottonWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
